markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on goals, target audience, and content strategy for Hypermode's engagement with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hypermode is transitioning from Dgraph, aiming to migrate content and domain authority while building category awareness for AI-native/model-native apps](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Target audience spans ML engineers to traditional app developers, with increasing enterprise traction](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Content strategy will focus on educating about building secure, compliant, scalable AI experiences, leveraging Hypermode's unique positioning](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Website migration from Dgraph to Hypermode planned for end of month, requiring careful SEO considerations](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)

## Topics

### Goals and Objectives

  - [Build category awareness for Hypermode's approach to AI-native/model-native apps](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Migrate content and domain authority from Dgraph to Hypermode](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Develop foundational knowledge assets for target audience](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Test various marketing messages (e.g. "model-native" vs "AI-native") to refine positioning](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)

### Target Audience and Positioning

  - [Spans ML engineers familiar with models to traditional app developers](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Seeing more traction with enterprises and innovation labs](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
  - [Shift from self-service to focus on organizations with complex needs and multiple stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
  - [Emphasize knowledge graph + AI use cases, moving beyond traditional graph database positioning](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

### Content Strategy and Process

  - [Currently limited formal process, working to revamp blog publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
  - [Will's technical content typically starts with demo/code, then expands to video, blog post, social](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=2259.0)
  - [Opportunity to repurpose existing video content into written form](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=2274.0)
  - [No CMS currently - using MDX files in GitHub, but evaluating options](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=2965.0)

### Website Migration

  - [Plan to deprecate Dgraph website by end of month](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Need strategy for 301 redirects, canonicals, and handling SEO transition](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Special consideration needed for Dgraph Q\&A forum content](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Current list focuses on database competitors](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Need to expand to include AI development frameworks](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Jessica to provide updated list with context on direct competitors](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)

### Analytics and Tools

  - [Using Fathom instead of Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=3038.0)
  - [Will provide access to Fathom, Search Console, and other relevant tools](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=3045.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jessica to share updated competitor list and context](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [Hypermode team to provide access to relevant tools/accounts (Fathom, Search Console, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=3104.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up with specific migration recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct research and prepare initial content opportunities for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)
  - [Schedule weekly sync meetings, preferably on Wednesdays or Thursdays](https://fathom.video/share/Y-LsEsj-UAMvxysDcJtqyqba1rgqev8S?tab=summary&timestamp=3129.0)
